case_title: MAHTAB SHAHKARAMI VS. GEORGE VALVERDE, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF et al
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER SHAHKARAMI, MAHTAB ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO RESPONDENT GEORGE VALVERDE, DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES H. W.A. HEARING OFFICER OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES, A CALIFORNIA STATE AGENCY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MAHTAB SHAHKARAMI'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED. THERE IS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO REASONABLY INFER PLAINTIFF WAS DRIVING WITH A BLOOD ALCOHOL CONTENT ABOVE 0.08% BASED ON THE INFORMATION IN THE POLICE REPORT AND THE BLOOD TEST, WHICH IS PROPERLY CONSIDERED IN THIS ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDINGS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MAHTAB SHAHKARAMI'S Petition For Writ Of Mandamus IS DENIED. THERE IS SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO REASONABLY INFER PLAINTIFF WAS DRIVING WITH A BLOOD ALCOHOL CONTENT ABOVE 0.08% BASED ON THE INFORMATION IN THE POLICE REPORT AND THE BLOOD TEST, WHICH IS PROPERLY CONSIDERED IN THIS ADMINISTRATIVE PROCEEDINGS. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
